subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! If ye but knew in what state my heart was when I took up my pen to write unto you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء اگر بدانید که چون خامه گرفتم که بشما نامه نگارم قلب در چه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement
